gates.check: Exactly one playbook loaded; topic in enum; no cross-playbook bleed.
Every non-obvious claim carries one Alfa-core tag; one family, one spelling.
Each [ASSUMPTION] is paired with a concrete verification step.
Every recommended pattern names a rejected alternative and the cost paid.
Quality-attribute scenarios use a number + unit, not adjectives.
Cost expressed only as FTE-months/disclaimers; no currency figures.
Required template fields filled or [ASSUMPTION]+verification; never TBD.
If depth=quick, what was skipped is named explicitly.
